title: H-A2 targeted data/regime expansion plan for breakeven-aware ORB evidence
purpose: Convert the H-A2.62 blocker from a vague sample-size problem into a targeted data plan: collect only the minimum option-chain, underlying-bar, liquidity, forced-close, and regime fields needed to test whether a breakeven-aware SPY 0DTE ORB debit vertical rule can be evaluated without lookahead.

wiki_basis.use: Implementable PnL, bid/ask friction, fees, cost drag, and breakeven math must govern option-strategy evidence.
Sample adequacy must be measured with MinTRL rather than a fixed N target.
PSR must be reported with sample length, skewness, kurtosis, and serial correlation before acceptance claims.
Regime filters can be useful but are overfitting risks; expansion must track volatility, macro, calendar, trend, and liquidity regimes.

research_question: What is the minimum targeted data expansion needed to evaluate whether H-A2's breakeven-aware ORB debit vertical candidates have enough decision-time payoff feasibility, regime coverage, and sample adequacy to justify a later locked-rule OOS test?

hypothesis_status_after_h_a2_62.conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
hypothesis_status_after_h_a2_62.reason: Current local train artifacts can run surrogate followthrough trials but cannot compute per-candidate option payoff geometry across the train distribution.

dataset_candidates: Databento EQUS.MINI when available for date range
IBKR data-only path only after readiness gate
required_windows_et: full regular session if stop/target path is later introduced
underlying_bars.why_required: Compute the ORB signal, entry underlying price, direction, post-entry path context, and forced-close underlying reference without treating SPY 1-minute bars as the hypothesis itself.

option_chain_entry.strike_scope: all same-day SPY option strikes from 0.97x to 1.03x of entry underlying price, or wider if the nearest-discrete selection audit shows missed candidates
option_chain_entry.why_required: Map the continuous ORB/moneyness idea to tradable discrete strikes and compute entry mid debit, implementable debit, bid/ask width, and liquidity.

option_chain_forced_close.why_required: Compute mid PnL and implementable PnL for the selected vertical legs at forced close, including cost drag.

required_windows: available before 09:35 ET decision, except liquidity bucket derived from entry quotes
regime_labels.why_required: Prevent sample expansion from overfitting one market state and expose whether H-A2 only works in a specific volatility, macro, calendar, trend, or liquidity regime.

planned_target_sets.purpose: Backfill option payoff geometry for existing train candidate/non-risk days before selecting any revised rule.
planned_target_sets.target_day_rule: all train non-risk trade days and adjacent control candidates needed to compute loss-rate and payoff-feasibility distribution

planned_target_sets.purpose: Use already downloaded 2025 normal/control packs to validate parser, strike mapping, and breakeven target logic on clean control regimes before larger spend.
planned_target_sets.target_day_rule: all candidate-ready dates from the two downloaded control packs, plus no-trade inventory counts only

planned_target_sets.purpose: Add stress/high-VIX geometry only after train geometry proves the revised target can be computed and a cost estimate shows enough budget.
planned_target_sets.date_source: 2022-10 already downloaded OPRA quotes plus unresolved SPY bar source; later high-VIX months only if a source/cost gate passes
planned_target_sets.target_day_rule: quote-available high/stress VIX days with matching underlying bars

planned_target_sets.purpose: Reserve OOS data use for a single pre-registered locked rule after train geometry and rule selection are complete.
planned_target_sets.target_day_rule: chronological OOS candidate days matching the locked train rule; no threshold selection from OOS
regime_coverage_required: at least one stress or elevated-volatility regime if available without broad buying

acceptance_forbidden_until: true breakeven-aware rule is locked on train only
OOS sample passes or honestly labels MinTRL/PSR blockers
big-day dependency does not overturn the conclusion
implementable PnL remains positive after cost drag

cost_and_execution_policy.selected_provider_for_next_estimate: Databento only if cache inventory shows missing fields and the selected key remains inside cap
stop_conditions: estimated selected-key usage would exceed per-key cap
estimated combined MO/AI usage would exceed pool cap
requested data is not tied to one of the target_set_id values

planned_next_artifact.name: h_a2_targeted_geometry_cache_inventory_and_cost_estimate
planned_next_artifact.purpose: Inventory existing local/cache coverage for the target sets, then estimate grouped Databento cost only for missing fields/windows. Do not download data in this step.
required_outputs: candidate date count by split and regime
selected key env for estimate if a live estimate is run

allowed_claims: H-A2.63 pre-registers the minimum targeted data/regime expansion plan needed after H-A2.62.
The next step is cache inventory and cost estimate, not paid download.
The plan forbids broad calendar buying and OOS rule evaluation.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim a breakeven-aware rule is selected for trading.
Do not approve paid download from this artifact alone.
Do not approve OOS evaluation from this artifact alone.
Do not approve paper trading, operational validation, or real-money trading.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
completion_criteria: The plan cites H-A2.62 as the controlling blocker.
The minimum missing option-chain, underlying-bar, liquidity, forced-close, and regime fields are explicit.
Target sets are prioritized and tied to hypothesis/regime gaps.
MinTRL, PSR, DSR, big-day dependency, active trade count, and under-sampled/underpowered labels are required before acceptance.
The next artifact is cache inventory and cost estimate only.
Paid download, OOS rule evaluation, broad calendar buying, paper trading, and E2 claims are forbidden.
tier_blockers: No cache inventory or cost estimate run yet
No true breakeven-aware train rule locked
No OOS evaluation of a locked revised rule
next_safe_action: Run H-A2.64 cache inventory and metadata/cost-estimate planning for the H-A2.63 target sets. Do not download data yet.
